title: DraconisMarch Reviews 30 3 part Video
wikitext:
[]: DraconisMarch Reviews 3.0 (3-part Video)             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Jun 24, 2013 1:16 am This review is in three parts, only the first one is on Blip and also the only one with accompanying images from the film. I don't agree with all of it, and it's very snarky at times, but he does a good job with pointing out what pissed people off about Q. Part 1: [url]http://blip.tv/draconismarch/review-analysis-evangelion-3-0-you-can-not-redo-this-movie-part-1-6585422[/url] Part 2: [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tr-dW5vkmnI[/url] Part 3: [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z-cAZVlBjVQ[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jun 24, 2013 1:24 am "Interesting review" as a title doesn't tell me much. Cuz who would post a boring review, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon Jun 24, 2013 1:25 am Good God, he sounds exactly like you expect him to. In short: "This movie doesn't explain stuff! I want it to explain stuff!"

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Mon Jun 24, 2013 1:29 am [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13445/30-Film-Reaction-Thread/840/?[/url] First two parts posted in here, by me. But yeah, he points out stuff why he(And some people) hate(s) 3.33 pretty well and i can see why he(they) would hate it. Although, i disagree with him mostly. Also, i don't want to watch the 3rd part cause i would become even more butt hurt fanboy of the 3.33 and i might send him hate mail if i watch this review any further. (Which is the thing i don't want to happen)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jun 24, 2013 1:34 am He's user #6007 here.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon Jun 24, 2013 1:57 am Is it really necessary to create individual threads every time someone does a video review pertaining to Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Thu Jun 27, 2013 2:27 am Totally nailed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jun 27, 2013 3:58 am Refuse to watch it. Just looked up what he does. But I'm sure the guy swears a lot - I'm thinking the word "fuck" & "cunt" abounds in the review - puts an excess of text & witty puns over images from the film like everyone else online & thinks he's a lot more clever than he actually is. Another knockoff of RedLetterMedia. Am I right? Those guys are a dime a dozen. I will repeat my common belief again. Anime as a genre is awash in terrible storytelling, shoddy characterization & immature traits as a whole. Are there some good works in there? Absolutely. BUT if all you do is watch anime & talk about anime & review anime you probably don't all that interesting or unique a perspective to offer intelligent insight. I will refuse to watch this review because a quick look at his video log on Youtube shows that all this guy does is review anime. He dedicates his free time to making videos about anime. Most likely any references to what is good, what is bad, what works & what fails is in reference to other anime. His insights into anything begin & end with anime. Guys who talk about Japanese cartoons with loud voices on Youtube are a dime a dozen. Not to mention guys who talk about Fan-rants & Butthurt (an actual video title he made, thus showcasing some real maturity & why wouldn't I want to listen to such savvy insight into why there is so much butthurt) are also a dime a dozen. Having a loud voice & talking about just cartoons doesn't cut it. Whatever. If I had mod powers I'd either lock this thread or move it elsewhere. I don't. I can't. Oh well. I said my piece. Not sure if anyone wanted to hear it. But at least I didn't take 3 videos to do so I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Jun 27, 2013 6:18 am I lasted 5 minutes. Just going "Huh, what does that mean?" at EVERY little unexplained detail does not make a good review, even if it is only the first part. This guy is an Eva and indeed an anime fan and its a surprised when not everything is explained? This is why I LIKE anime. Show, dont tell. Conclusion: it's for comic effect. Except it isn't funny. Or it's being the aforementioned butthurt fanboy he complains about. Either way, I'm out.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Jun 27, 2013 6:36 am Skipped around part one, this guy really loves to swear doesn't he. definitely seems butthurt.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Jun 27, 2013 6:39 am As far as I can tell from the section I managed to watch, he doesn't like it because he would need to think to make head or tail of it. He's not thinking about it enough to make an actual judgement about what it's attempting to do, and whether it is doing that well or not. I don't count it as a strike against the film that someone like that doesn't get along with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Thu Jun 27, 2013 6:48 am I took it upon myself to change the title to something a little more identifiable. I'm only guessing that this person should be called DraconisMarch based on his youtube channel name and Blip TV name.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jun 27, 2013 6:52 am I HATE it when people talk as if they knew everything. He says that nobody can like this movie...What? I like it. That's it. There are people with different opinions. It's not that they're stupid, it's just that they know more about film than you. Hell, people that know about film and don't like it don't talk like that either. I've only watched 30 secons. Best part: The beginning with soundtrack and scenes from the film. But I won't see this. I don't want to get as angry as when I watched Anime Abandon's EoE "review". I agree with Gendo's Papa on the reasons this guy doesn't like the film.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Jun 27, 2013 6:55 am Monk Ed, maybe you should merge this thred with the "3.0 Reaction" thread, it have better its place there I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Thu Jun 27, 2013 7:06 am No, that thread is for EGF posters to post their first-time "WOW" (etc) reactions. Its purpose is far too specific and useful for me to risk mucking it up with something like this.
